# Detour Cloud
> Cross-platform AI agent runtime. Build autonomous agents on the open elizaOS framework, deploy to web, Mac, and iPhone. Passkey login. Free tier. $DTOUR perks.

## Core Pages
- [Landing](https://detour.ninja/): AI agent platform — WebAuthn passkey auth, 100+ plugins, MCP toolchains, cross-platform runtime (web, Swoosh macOS, iPhone), $DTOUR holder tiers (Scout 1M, Operator 5M)
- [$DTOUR Token](https://detour.ninja/token): Solana SPL perks token (mint DijmsEDeTXsWCkCLkhYJNTutKaHf541xZshVrCUbcozy) — 1B supply, Pump.fun launch. Hold for discounts, not access.
- [Login](https://detour.ninja/login): Sign in with passkey (Face ID, Touch ID) or connect Solana wallet
- [Terms of Service](https://detour.ninja/terms-of-service): Delaware law, 12 sections covering accounts, $DTOUR, free tier, billing
- [Privacy Policy](https://detour.ninja/privacy-policy): Data stored in Ashburn, VA (DigitalOcean), no tracking cookies, GDPR-style rights

## Key Facts
- Detour Cloud is a white-label reseller of ElizaOS Cloud at a flat 20% markup
- Auth uses WebAuthn passkeys (Face ID, Touch ID, device PIN) as primary, Solana wallet SIWS as secondary
- Free tier with monthly capped compute credits — no crypto wallet required
- $DTOUR token thresholds: Scout (1M), Operator (5M) — hold to unlock discounted coding sandbox and inference rates
- Infrastructure: DigitalOcean droplets in Ashburn, Virginia, USA
- Self-hosted Convex backend (PostgreSQL + document store)
- Framework: elizaOS (autonomous agent runtime, 100+ plugins)
- Token mint: DijmsEDeTXsWCkCLkhYJNTutKaHf541xZshVrCUbcozy (Solana SPL)
- Brand: dark glass design, ninja squirrel mascot, "taking the scenic route"
- Data never trained on, encrypted in transit and at rest

## Capabilities
- Chat & support agents (customer service, community moderation, personal AI)
- Coding & dev agents (code review, PR automation, debugging, CI/CD)
- Design & creative agents (image generation, visual analysis, creative pipelines)
- Cross-platform runtime (web dashboard, macOS Swoosh menu bar, iPhone companion)
- Workflow automation (multi-step pipelines, branching, state, conditionals)
- Plugin ecosystem (100+ plugins: blockchain, social, media, data, code)
- Custom MCP toolchains via Model Context Protocol

## Platforms
- Web dashboard (any browser)
- macOS native app (Swoosh — menu bar agent + local MLX inference)
- iPhone companion app
- Self-hosted pairing mode
- REST API (programmatic access)
- Bot connectors: Discord, Telegram, Twitter/X

## Tiers
- Free: passkey login, monthly credits, all surfaces, no crypto required
- Scout (1M $DTOUR): discounted coding sandbox rates
- Operator (5M $DTOUR): best rates on coding + inference

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: Vite 8 + React 19 + Tailwind v4 + react-router-dom 7
- Auth: @simplewebauthn (WebAuthn), SIWS (Solana wallet)
- Backend: Convex (self-hosted, PostgreSQL)
- Agent Runtime: elizaOS via ElizaCloud
- Token: Solana SPL ($DTOUR)
- Hosting: DigitalOcean (Ashburn, VA)
- Domain: detour.ninja

## Social
- X: @detour_squirrel
